channel.title: New on US Streaming
channel.description: Movies added to Netflix, Max, Prime Video, Hulu, and Apple TV+ for the first time.

item.title: [Netflix] The Marked Woman (2026)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · Argentina / Spain · 1h 49m · Thriller, Crime · dir. Gabe Ibáñez · with Candela Peña, Ana Rujas

TMDB 3.6 (7)

When a woman is found in a shipping container with no memory of who she is, two detectives race to figure out her identity — and who wants her dead.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Netflix] Office Romance (2026)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · United States of America · 1h 55m · R · Romance, Comedy · dir. Ol Parker · with Jennifer Lopez, Brett Goldstein

TMDB 7.0 (25)

Jackie, President and CEO of Air Cruz, runs a tight ship in her business, including a rigid anti-fraternization policy for all her employees. When a new sexy lawyer begins working for her, that policy becomes very tested.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Netflix] Instadocs: Alex Murdaugh, Unconvicted (2026)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · United States of America · 30m · PG-13 · Documentary · with Alex Murdaugh, Alan Wilson

TMDB 8.0 (3)

Why was Alex Murdaugh's conviction overturned? The debut of "Instadocs" digs into stunning allegations of jury interference in his double murder trial.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Netflix] Mexico 86 (2026)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · Mexico / United States of America · 1h 35m · R · Comedy, History, Drama · dir. Gabriel Ripstein · with Diego Luna, Karla Souza

TMDB 8.4 (5)

When a last-minute chance to host the 1986 World Cup appears, a cunning Mexican bureaucrat, armed with nothing but guts and audacity, cons his way through FIFA to beat the United States, but in a country of power games, every victory has a price.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Max] Pillion (2025)
item.description:
New on Max

2025 · United Kingdom / Ireland / Netherlands · 1h 47m · NR · Romance, Drama, Comedy · dir. Harry Lighton · with Harry Melling, Alexander Skarsgård

TMDB 6.4 (196) · IMDb 6.9 · RT 99% · Metacritic 85

Colin, a timid gay man, is swept off his feet when Ray, an enigmatic and impossibly handsome biker, takes him on as his submissive in a crazy and erotic BDSM-focused relationship.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] The Pout-Pout Fish (2026)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2026 · Australia / United States of America / Germany · 1h 31m · PG · Animation, Family, Adventure, Comedy · dir. Ricard Cussó · with Nick Offerman, Nina Oyama

TMDB 5.8 (10)

Living on a rundown shipwreck, Mr. Fish one day discovers a hyperactive young sea dragon Pip – who had mistaken his home for a junkyard – pilfering his belongings. The heated argument that ensues leaves both their houses in ruin. But there is hope! Embarking on a seemingly impossible quest in search of the mythical 'Shimmer' to grant them a wish, there’s only one problem: someone else is on the hunt...

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Netflix] Poldi (2026)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · Germany · 1h 34m · Documentary · dir. Nicolas Berse, Simone Schillinger, Kai Sehr · with Lukas Podolski

TMDB 6.5 (1)

Footballer, entrepreneur, fan favorite and true community hero — Lukas Podolski reflects on his journey and what comes next in this intimate documentary.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Netflix] The Murder of Rachel Nickell (2026)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · United States of America · 1h 36m · Documentary, Crime · dir. Lucy Bowden

A young mother is killed in broad daylight on London's Wimbledon Common — in front of her toddler. This documentary examines the yearslong murder case.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Netflix] Maa Behen (2026)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · India · 2h 7m · PG-13 · Comedy, Thriller, Drama · dir. Suresh Triveni · with Madhuri Dixit, Triptii Dimri

In this dark comedy, a woman calls her estranged daughters in the middle of the night with chilling news — there's a dead body in her kitchen.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Hulu] Jetlee (2026)
item.description:
New on Hulu

2026 · India · 2h 12m · Action, Comedy, Thriller · dir. Ritesh Rana · with Satya, Rhea Singha

TMDB 6.0 (2) · IMDb 7.5

An attendant on a flight from Dubai to Kochi gets caught up in a dangerous situation.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Hulu] Jimpa (2026)
item.description:
New on Hulu

2026 · Australia / Netherlands / United States of America / Finland / Belgium · 1h 53m · Drama · dir. Sophie Hyde · with Olivia Colman, Aud Mason-Hyde

TMDB 7.2 (2) · IMDb 5.8 · RT 51% · Metacritic 54

Hannah and her non-binary teenager Frances visit her gay grandfather Jimpa in Amsterdam. Frances expresses a desire to stay with their grandfather for a year, challenging Hannah's parenting beliefs and forcing her to confront past issues.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Netflix] David (2025)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2025 · United States of America / South Africa · 1h 49m · PG · Animation, Drama, Family, History · dir. Phil Cunningham, Brent Dawes · with Brandon Engman, Brian Stivale

TMDB 8.1 (146) · IMDb 6.9 · RT 80% · Metacritic 55

From the songs of his mother’s heart to the whispers of a faithful God, David’s story begins in quiet devotion. When the giant Goliath rises to terrorize a nation, a young shepherd armed with only a sling, a few stones, and unshakable faith steps forward. Pursued by power and driven by purpose, his journey tests the limits of loyalty, love, and courage—culminating in a battle not just for a crown, but for the soul of a kingdom.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] The Deadly Little Mermaid (2026)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2026 · United Kingdom · 1h 20m · Horror · dir. Cameron Uzoka · with Elliott Eason, Sophia Carroll

TMDB 5.0 (25) · IMDb 2.5

Some secrets are better left at the bottom of the ocean. Once she's in your house, there is no escape. When a struggling artist pulls a beautiful, unconscious woman from the freezing coastal waters, he thinks he’s performed a miracle. But as she recovers within the walls of his secluded home, a series of unsettling events leads him to a terrifying realization: her presence is no coincidence. She is inextricably linked to the same watery grave that claimed his family years ago.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] Bride of Frankenstein Awakens (2026)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2026 · United Kingdom · 1h 47m · Horror · dir. Louisa Warren · with Sophie-Jo Beman, Chris Black

TMDB 5.0 (1) · IMDb 3.4

In a quiet British seaside town, Santana, a troubled young woman desperate to escape her suffocating family, runs away with her volatile boyfriend Frank. The pair marry in a rundown coastal venue, hoping for a fresh start — but their new life is shattered when a mysterious car rams into them on a rural night road, killing Santana instantly and leaving Frank consumed by grief and obsession. Refusing to accept her death, Frank traps his former medical professor, Dr. Pret — a man secretly infatuated with Santana — and forces him to help reanimate her using a stolen voodoo ritual. As Frank’s desperation deepens, he manipulates and blackmails Pret into harvesting “perfect” body parts from Santana’s own family, driving both men further into depravity.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] Betty's Revenge (2026)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2026 · 1h 14m · Horror · dir. Brett Bentman · with Hannah Fierman, Tiffany McDonald

TMDB 3.0 (1)

Three college seniors venture to the abandoned Dizzy Dishes cabaret club while researching its fiery past. They encounter the former owner, Betty — who claims to be half woman, half “something else.”

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] Husky Christmas (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2025 · United Kingdom · 1h 23m · Adventure · dir. Sushank Kini · with Danielle Scott, Stephen Staley

Burned-out exec Olivia and reclusive writer Theo meet when their dogs' leashes tangle, sparking a charming, unexpected romance-for both pairs.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] The Estate (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2025 · United Kingdom · 1h 53m · Thriller, Drama · dir. Carlo Gabriel Nero · with Vanessa Redgrave, Franco Nero

The story of the Wellsleys, an aristocratic family unable to save their ancestral estate because of debts. As they struggle to find a solution, a series of disturbing apparitions begin to haunt them, forcing the Wellsleys to confront the deep injustices they and other landowners, past and present, have wrought.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] Can You Hear Me? (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2025 · United Kingdom · 1h 56m · NR · Romance, War, Fantasy · dir. Simon Hunter · with Peter Facinelli, Charlotte Radford

A fallen WWI American soldier strikes a divine bargain to reunite with his bride in England. As he resumes life unaware he's a ghost, love and loss blur. When Annabel learns the truth-now carrying his child-she must face heartbreak and find the strength to let him go.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] Arctic's Edge (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2025 · United Kingdom · 1h 21m · Thriller · dir. Max Keough · with David Lenik, Rory Wilton

TMDB 4.6 (5)

Calvin Trask lives in a dead end Arctic town on the fringes of society, until mysterious stranger Lucas Wade arrives, turning his solitary life upside down. Calvin's curiosity gets the better of him and is quickly pulled into Lucas' dangerous world. As secrets slowly unravel, Calvin realises just what kind of jeopardy he's put himself in, a place where murder and betrayal are at the forefront, in this icy Nordic thriller.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Netflix] Bunny!! (2026)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · Vietnam · 2h 7m · Romance, Drama, Thriller · dir. Trấn Thành · with Trấn Thành, Nguyen Dieu Huyen

TMDB 7.0 (1) · IMDb 5.9

A host of a relationship advice television programme starts to see cracks in her own marriage after the appearance of a mysterious guest.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] Dragon Fury 3 (2026)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2026 · United Kingdom · 1h 35m · Horror · dir. E J Marshall · with Connor Horrigan, Lauren Staerck

IMDb 6.5

Deep within a high-security government bunker, an ancient nightmare has broken loose. This time, there’s nowhere to run. A daring break-in at a classified research facility quickly turns into a bloodbath when a group of intruders discovers they aren't alone. Instead of the secrets they came for, they find themselves hunted by genetically engineered, apex predators: lethal dragons with a taste for human prey. Trapped between a tactical lockdown and the jaws of prehistoric monsters, the group must fight through dark corridors and deadly traps. It’s a race against time to escape before the facility is purged - or the dragons finish their feast.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] Dinosaur Hunt (2026)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2026 · United Kingdom · 1h 28m · Horror, Science Fiction · dir. Gregory Randolph Jr. · with Helen Baird, Emma Charnock

A rich family are brought together to a remote island for a reunion, only to learn that their father has been experimenting with dinosaurs in an attempt to find a cure for his disease. This family are forced to work together when the dinosaurs escape.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] 267 (2026)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2026 · 1h 59m · Drama · dir. Jesse Frank · with Rachel Petsiavas, Michael James Sewell Jr.

TMDB 5.0 (1)

When a brother and sister are reunited after years of separation, they uncover a dark secret about one of the worlds largest pharmaceutical companies. Eager to expose the truth, they have no choice but to face their darkest fears together.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] Buffalo Daze (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2025 · United States of America · 2h · Western, Drama · dir. Raen LeVell · with Chris Mulkey, Brady Jandreau

TMDB 5.0 (3)

An Indian Reservation Robin Hood, "Indian cowboy" Jim Grinder was an outlaw to the government but a hero to his Tribe, who as the Old West passed and the world stumbled toward war fought a law that would make his very existence a crime.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] One Big Snake (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2025 · United States of America · 1h 20m · Horror, Comedy, Thriller · dir. Charlie Steeds · with Chad N Wilson, Zainab Hicks

A family plans to renovate a rundown farmhouse during the summer but uncovers a nest of giant snake eggs and an unusual squatter on the property... Soon the eggs hatch, releasing deadly killer snakes and the family must begin a deadly fight to survive.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] Wickedness (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2025 · United Kingdom · 1h 12m · Horror · dir. E J Marshall · with Rebecca Rose McILroy, Christopher Blackmore

Two witches put against each other. One good, one evil. Who will have the ultimate wickedness?

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] A Savage Art: The Life & Cartoons of Pat Oliphant (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2025 · United States of America · 1h 29m · NR · Documentary · dir. Bill Banowsky · with Patrick Oliphant

Patrick Oliphant was a giant slayer, bravely taking on presidents, popes and the American corporate class with his mighty pen. An Australian transplant, Oliphant became America's most renowned and feared political cartoonist for five decades. With his biting wit and masterful drawing skills, Oliphant attacked individual and institutional corruption, collusion, greed, hypocrisy and arrogance, no matter the size or status of his targets.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] The Women in Security Documentary (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2025 · 1h 13m · Documentary · dir. Yvette Freeman · with Marene Allison, Nicole Buratovich

An award-winning documentary amplifying the voices of women shaping the security industry today. Through film and live conversations, each screening creates space for connection, reflection, and dialogue that continues long after the credits roll.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Netflix] Milky☆Subway: The Galactic Limited Express - the Movie (2026)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · Japan · 46m · PG-13 · Animation, Action, Adventure, Comedy, Science Fiction · dir. Yohei Kameyama · with Momoka Terasawa, Anna Nagase

TMDB 8.2 (4) · IMDb 6.6

Six delinquents are tasked with cleaning a train as part of a community service program. But when the train suddenly takes off, chaos ensues.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] Really Happy Someday (2026)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2026 · Canada · 1h 29m · NR · Drama, Romance · dir. J. Stevens · with Breton Lalama, Katharine King So

A rising musical theatre star struggles with his changing voice during his gender transition. With the help of a singing coach, he learns to trust himself, reclaim his career, and reconnect with the people he loves.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] Submarine (2026)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2026 · United Kingdom · 1h 14m · Action · dir. Max McCall · with Cici Clarke, Matt Lewis

A deep-sea research submarine becomes stranded miles below the ocean surface after a mysterious systems failure. As oxygen runs low and pressure mounts, the crew battles rising panic, hidden tensions, and an unseen force outside the hull.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] Five Date Rule (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2025 · United States of America · 1h 37m · PG · Romance, TV Movie, Comedy · dir. Jeff Rose · with Janelle Arthur, Jason Burkey

TMDB 7.0 (1)

When a children's book author gets a subscription to an online dating app for her birthday, the series of outrageous mismatches convince her more than ever that she's meant to be single.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] Rabbit Trap (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2025 · United States of America / United Kingdom · 1h 28m · Thriller, Horror, Mystery, Fantasy · dir. Bryn Chainey · with Dev Patel, Rosy McEwen

TMDB 5.8 (35) · RT 48%

When a musician and her husband move to a remote house in Wales, the music they make disturbs local ancient folk magic, bringing a nameless child to their door who is intent on infiltrating their lives.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] A Country Encore (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2025 · Canada · 1h 30m · with Amanda Jordan, Connor McMahon

TMDB 7.5 (2)

A corporate jingle writer is on the verge of abandoning her songwriting dreams for good when she mistakenly hands over an old love song to the man who broke her heart, a famous country singer is looking for his next hit.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.description:
New on Hulu

2026 · Comedy, Animation, Fantasy, Adventure, Family · dir. Vicky Jenson, Andrew Adamson · with Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy

item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · 1h 23m · Documentary · with Eddie Murphy, Andia Winslow

Follows the 51st AFI Life Achievement Award ceremony honoring Eddie Murphy for his five-decade career in film, television and stand-up comedy.

item.title: [Netflix] Dead Man's Wire (2026)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · United States of America / Israel / Belgium / Cyprus / Germany · 1h 45m · R · Crime, Drama, Thriller · dir. Gus Van Sant · with Bill Skarsgård, Dacre Montgomery

TMDB 6.5 (132) · IMDb 6.5 · Metacritic 67

In 1977, former real estate developer Tony Kiritsis puts a dead man's switch on himself and the mortgage banker who did him wrong, demanding $5 million and a personal apology.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Netflix] K-Pops! (2026)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · United States of America · 1h 54m · PG-13 · Comedy, Drama, Music · dir. Anderson .Paak · with Anderson .Paak, Jee Young Han

TMDB 7.0 (5) · RT 88%

A washed-up musician travels to Korea to write for K-pop stars, discovering that his long-lost son is set to front one of the country’s hottest new groups. He then jumps at the opportunity to capitalize on his son’s stardom for his own renaissance, but learns that fatherhood is much more fulfilling and meaningful than stardom.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Max] Miss You, Love You (2026)
item.description:
New on Max

2026 · United States of America · 1h 38m · Drama · dir. Jim Rash · with Allison Janney, Andrew Rannells

TMDB 5.5 (2)

A blunt, grieving widow is forced to plan her husband’s funeral with a total stranger: her estranged gay son’s gay assistant. As they fumble through grief and their strange, darkly funny circumstances, buried secrets and long-held resentments surface, but their partnership becomes an unlikely conduit for connection, laughter, and healing for this mother and her unexpected surrogate son.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Hulu] Psycho Killer (2026)
item.description:
New on Hulu

2026 · United States of America / Germany · 1h 31m · R · Crime, Horror, Mystery · dir. Gavin Polone · with Georgina Campbell, James Preston Rogers

TMDB 5.4 (54) · IMDb 4.7 · Metacritic 26

Following the brutal murder of her husband, a Kansas highway patrol officer sets out on a journey to track down the perpetrator. As the hunt progresses, she comes to realize the man responsible is a sadistic serial killer, and the depth of his mental depravity and his sinister agenda is more twisted than anyone could have imagined.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Max] Perilous Passage: Birth in America (2026)
item.description:
New on Max

2026 · United States of America · 1h 36m · PG-13 · Documentary · with Christy Turlington

IMDb 7.1

A look at the impact of an already very precarious maternal health state in the U.S. post-rescinding of Roe v. Wade, via the Supreme Court's Dobbs decision, reversing rights that women have been working so hard to fight for, and that will actually have a deep impact that we can't even see just yet in terms of the numbers of mortality and trauma as a result of those very draconian policies.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Max] The Moment (2026)
item.description:
New on Max

2026 · United States of America · 1h 43m · R · Music, Comedy, Thriller · dir. Aidan Zamiri · with Charli xcx, Alexander Skarsgård

TMDB 6.4 (60) · IMDb 6.1 · Metacritic 53

A rising pop sensation navigates fame and industry pressures while preparing for her arena tour debut, revealing the transformation of underground culture into mainstream success.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] Speed Faster (2026)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2026 · 1h 27m · Action, Thriller · dir. Jason Park · with Jason Park, Christopher Deon

TMDB 6.9 (7) · IMDb 6.0

Ace and his crew of elite street racers are forced into a high-stakes mission when a shadowy organization threatens someone close to him. In the aftermath of Four Amigos, they find themselves working for the infamous Church of Assassins, tasked with pulling off an impossible job. But as they push their limits, they uncover a chilling truth-failure was always part of the plan. Betrayal, speed, and survival collide in this adrenaline-fueled thriller where the real race isn't just for victory, but for their lives.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] Blind Cop 2 (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2025 · United States of America · 1h 23m · Action, Comedy · dir. Alec Bonk · with George Fearing, Isaac McKinnon

When an influx of illegal weapons trafficking explodes onto the scene, a grieving blind police officer must purge the city streets or risk mass chaos breaking loose.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Hulu] The Body in the Locker (2025)
item.description:
New on Hulu

2025 · Thriller, TV Movie, Crime · dir. Sean Cisterna · with Kirsten Comerford, Jayne Heitmeyer

TMDB 6.0 (1)

When Amy, the CEO of a major charity, loses her father, she's shocked to discover he owned a mysterious storage locker with a deadly secret inside - the body of a woman. Was her father a murderer? Who was this woman?

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Netflix] Kylie: Tension Tour Live (2026)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · United Kingdom · 2h 3m · Music, Documentary, TV Movie · dir. Steve Price · with Kylie Minogue

It's time to hit the dancefloor as pop superstar Kylie Minogue shares a vibrant, exclusive behind-the-scenes look at her smash 2025 Tension World Tour.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Netflix] Emi Martínez: The Kid Who Stops Time (2026)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · 1h 17m · Animation, Documentary · dir. Gustavo Cova · with Emiliano Martínez, Lionel Messi

TMDB 7.0 (1)

Emiliano, a dreamy boy from Mar del Plata, became the ‘Dibu’ we all know today, one of the great heroes of Argentine football. Written by Hernán Casciari and directed by Gustavo Cova, it tells the story of this kid who discovers he has the power to stop time and argues with a ball that reminds him of all the challenges he has ahead. With a combination of animated sequences created by Liniers, archival footage, and interviews with his friends, family, and teammates, it is a tender and brave account of how his inner strength led him to achieve glory, becoming an inspiration for new generations.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Netflix] Kara (2026)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · India · 2h 41m · Crime, Drama, Thriller · dir. Vignesh Raja · with Dhanush, Mamitha Baiju

TMDB 6.8 (5)

A thief tries to go straight, but when predatory banks trap his father in debt, he returns to crime — with a determined cop closing in on his trail.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Netflix] The Lotto Winner (2026)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · Philippines · 2h · Family, Drama · dir. RC Delos Reyes · with Albert Martinez, Kylie Padilla

It follows an ordinary family whose lives are abruptly transformed by extraordinary luck—unraveling how money can both bind people together and quietly pull them apart.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Netflix] A Foggy Tale (2025)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2025 · Taiwan · 2h 14m · Drama · dir. Chen Yu-hsun · with Caitlin Fang, Will Or Wai-Lam

TMDB 7.5 (18)

Yue's brother was executed by the government. Determined to bring his body back home, Yue goes to Taipei alone and finds help in Chao Kung-tao, a discharged soldier. Two people with no relations become friends in need, embarking on a journey that could cost them their lives.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Netflix] Food Truck: Stolen Love... and Moo Deng (2025)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2025 · Thailand · 1h 45m · Comedy, Romance · dir. Chaleumpol Tikumpornteerawong, Watcharapong Pattama · with Mario Maurer, Choi Yu-lee

TMDB 5.8 (6) · IMDb 6.4

When a child sneaks onto their food truck looking for his father, three friends go on a wild road trip, running into police, monks — and a famous hippo.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Prime Video] Bloody Eyes (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2025 · 1h 24m · Science Fiction, Horror · dir. Rafael Nani · with Andrew Ghai, Geoffrey Gilbert

Detectives on a bust find themselves locked in an undercover lab. Place of bizarre experiments, they soon realize it’s not a normal drug lab, and they are not the only creature that will do whatever it takes to escape.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Hulu] In Cold Light (2026)
item.description:
New on Hulu

2026 · Canada / Finland / United States of America · 1h 36m · R · Thriller, Crime · dir. Maxime Giroux · with Maika Monroe, Troy Kotsur

TMDB 5.8 (33) · RT 55%

Fresh out of prison, Ava's attempt to reclaim her drug operation collapses when she witnesses a brutal crime, forcing her to flee into a nightmarish underworld where allies are scarce and enemies multiply by the minute.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Apple TV+] Propeller One-Way Night Coach (2026)
item.description:
New on Apple TV+

2026 · United States of America · 1h · PG · Adventure, Drama, Family · dir. John Travolta · with Clark Shotwell, Kelly Eviston-Quinnett

TMDB 6.0 (1) · IMDb 5.7 · Metacritic 42

During the golden age of aviation, a young airplane enthusiast and his mother embark on a cross-country journey to Hollywood—and their simple flight transforms into the trip of a lifetime.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Netflix] Room to Move (2025)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2025 · United States of America · 1h 50m · Documentary · dir. Alexander Hammer

Choreographer and performer Jenn Freeman has always possessed the gift of movement. From a very early age, she simply had to dance… all the time. But with that ever-present need to jump, leap, shake and squirm came a struggle to exist harmoniously in a world that seemed to assault her senses and sense of equilibrium at every turn.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Netflix] Untold UK: Vinnie Jones (2026)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · United Kingdom · 1h 17m · R · History, Documentary · dir. David Tryhorn, Ben Nicholas · with Vinnie Jones, John Fashanu

TMDB 7.0 (2)

This is the story of Vinnie Jones's rise, fall, and comeback against odds – and red cards – from one of football's most notorious hard men to FA cup winner.

Ask ChatGPT about reception →

item.title: [Hulu] Arco (2025)
item.description:
New on Hulu

2025 · France / United Kingdom / United States of America · 1h 29m · PG · Adventure, Animation, Family, Science Fiction · dir. Ugo Bienvenu · with Margot Ringard Oldra, Oscar Tresanini

TMDB 7.6 (213) · IMDb 7.3 · RT 93% · Metacritic 72

Ten-year-old Arco lives in a far future. During his first flight in his rainbow suit, he loses control and falls into the past. Iris, a girl his age from 2075, comes to his rescue and tries by any means to help send him back to his own era.

item.title: [Hulu] Descendent (2025)

After a traumatic brain injury triggers terrifying visions of extraterrestrials and a newfound talent for drawing, a father-to-be begins to question his reality and becomes obsessed with the need to protect his family from an unseen threat.

New on Hulu

2025 · United States of America · 1h 35m · R · Mystery, Horror, Thriller · dir. James DeMonaco · with Pete Davidson, John Glover

A troubled man starts working at a retirement home and realizes its residents and caretakers harbor sinister secrets. As he investigates the building and its forbidden fourth floor, he starts to uncover connections to his own past and upbringing as a foster child.

item.title: [Prime Video] Ancient Underwater Marvels: Evidence of Atlantis (2026)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2026 · 1h 1m · G · Documentary, Science Fiction · dir. Rodrigo John

By examining cutting edge sonar technology, expert analysis and a relentless pursuit of truth, scientists strip away the layers of speculation surrounding Atlantis

item.title: [Prime Video] Speed Train (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2025 · United States of America / Thailand · 1h 30m · Science Fiction, Action, Thriller · dir. Ryan Francis

TMDB 4.7 (9)

When a futuristic train journey turns chaotic due to a tech genius's malevolent hacking of brain-implanted passengers, a group of disparate travelers must band together to regain control, confronting not only immediate dangers but also the darker implications of unchecked technology.

item.title: [Netflix] Adili Idola Celebrity Roast: Fedi Nuril (2026)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · Indonesia · 2h 53m · Comedy

Actor Fedi Nuril takes the hot seat as he faces hilarious jokes from a panel of six comedians and celebrities through the “Trilogy of Laughter”.

item.title: [Netflix] Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie (2025)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2025 · United States of America · 1h 38m · G · Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation · dir. Ryan Crego

TMDB 6.8 (73) · IMDb 5.5 · RT 85% · Metacritic 46

Gabby heads out on a road trip with her Grandma Gigi to the urban wonderland of Cat Francisco. But when Gabby's dollhouse, her most prized possession, ends up in the hands of an eccentric cat lady named Vera, Gabby sets off on an adventure through the real world to get the Gabby Cats back together and save the dollhouse before it's too late.

item.title: [Max] The Bride! (2026)
item.description:
New on Max

2026 · United States of America · 2h 7m · R · Science Fiction, Horror, Fantasy · dir. Maggie Gyllenhaal

TMDB 6.2 (453) · IMDb 5.7 · RT 57% · Metacritic 55

A lonely Frankenstein travels to 1930s Chicago to ask groundbreaking scientist Dr. Euphronious to create a companion for him. The two revive a murdered young woman and The Bride is born. But what ensues is beyond what either of them imagined.

item.title: [Prime Video] Red Riding (2026)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2026 · United Kingdom · 1h 26m · NR · Horror, Thriller · dir. Craig Conway

TMDB 5.0 (3)

After her mother's overdose, teen Red Riding moves from London to her estranged grandmother's Scottish estate, where dark family secrets, missing children, and a monstrous wolf blur reality, forcing her to fight for survival.

item.title: [Prime Video] Aida, the Movie (2026)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2026 · Spain · 1h 38m · Comedy · dir. Paco León

TMDB 6.7 (23)

The film deals with the filming of an episode of the series with storylines that take place both within the fiction with the characters of 'Aída' and outside of it with the actors themselves and their relationships, which reflects on topics such as the limits of comedy, the work of a comedian and fame.

item.title: [Prime Video] Hazel's Heart (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2025 · United States of America · 1h 29m · NR · Drama · dir. Daniel Bielinski

TMDB 6.8 (6)

In March of 1920, just outside of Center, North Dakota, Hazel Miner and her two siblings – Emmet and Myrdith – are getting ready to leave school. The students have been sent home early as the weather has started to turn from a gentle snowfall to what looks like it could be a terrible snowstorm. The siblings struggle through the wind and snow, and their sled overturns into a coulee and the three take shelter to try and survive the night. As they fight to stay warm and awake, their parents and friends work furiously to try and find them before it’s too late.

item.title: [Prime Video] One Battle After Another (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2025 · United States of America · 2h 42m · R · Thriller, Crime, Comedy · dir. Paul Thomas Anderson

TMDB 7.4 (3,682) · IMDb 7.7 · RT 94% · Metacritic 95

Washed-up revolutionary Bob exists in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited, self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces after 16 years and she goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her, father and daughter both battling the consequences of his past.

item.title: [Prime Video] Teacher’s Pet (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video

2025 · United States of America · 1h 30m · Thriller · dir. Noam Kroll

TMDB 8.5 (2)

When brilliant but isolated high school senior Clara’s English teacher dies mysteriously, a charismatic replacement arrives who takes a disturbing interest in her academic potential. As Mr. Heller’s mentorship turns to dangerous obsession, Clara uncovers his horrifying secret identity and murderous past. Now trapped in a psychological game with a predator who’s eliminated anyone standing in his way, Clara must use her understanding of Heller’s twisted psychology against him before she becomes his next victim. Some lessons are worth dying for – others are worth killing for.

item.title: [Netflix] Ladies First (2026)
item.description:
New on Netflix

2026 · United States of America · 1h 34m · R · Comedy · dir. Thea Sharrock

TMDB 5.6 (28)

An arrogant but charismatic ladies' man finds his life of money, power and casual flings upended when he wakes up in a parallel world dominated by women.

item.title: [Max] Josh Johnson: Symphony (2026)
item.description:
New on Max

2026 · United States of America · Comedy · dir. Jacob Menache

In his first HBO comedy special, comedian Josh Johnson debuts original material about our shared experiences as humans – tackling topics like family, religion, and relationships through his unique point of view and signature creativity.

item.title: [Prime Video] Kyle Larson vs. The Double (2026)
item.description:
New on Prime Video — released 2026-05-21

Two-time NASCAR champion Kyle Larson attempts the notorious "Double," racing the Indianapolis 500 and the Coca-Cola 600 on the same day. With weather, exhaustion, and risk closing in, 1,100 miles offers a rare inside look at one of the toughest challenges in motorsports-and the man daring enough to take it on.

item.title: [Prime Video] Gaayapadda Simham (2026)
item.description:
New on Prime Video — released 2026-05-01

Follows Indians facing challenges while trying to travel to the USA and the struggles they encounter after reaching there.

item.title: [Prime Video] Quezon (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video — released 2025-10-15

A historical drama focusing on Manuel L. Quezon years after the Philippine Revolution during the American occupation. When his fight for independence from the United States is put to the test, Quezon finds himself playing the brutal game of politics to outmaneuver his rivals — including Leonard Wood, Sergio Osmeña, and Joven Hernando. In Quezon’s relentless quest for power, he ultimately faces off with Emilio Aguinaldo in the 1935 presidential elections, using charm and favoritism as both weapons and currency, in a campaign that ultimately changes the face of Philippine politics and history.

item.title: [Prime Video] Captain Tsunami (2025)
item.description:
New on Prime Video — released 2025-06-29

After her mother mysteriously goes missing, a young runaway tracks down an estranged family friend, convinced only he can decipher the secret meaning and story hidden in her mom's comic book.

item.title: [Prime Video] System (2026)
item.description:
New on Prime Video — released 2026-05-22

When Neha Rajvansh, a privileged public prosecutor, meets Sarika Rawat, a courtroom stenographer from a humble background, their lives are thrown into upheaval where power defines truth, blurring the system and raising a question of what justice truly means to them.
